columns.name: LEVNR
columns.description: The unique line item number for the product.

columns.name: LEVVARENR
columns.description: The code or identifier of the product.

columns.name: EANKODE
columns.description: The EAN (European Article Number) code for the product.

columns.name: FKNR
columns.description: The line number within an order.

columns.name: BRUKERID
columns.description: The unique identifier of the user associated with this record.

columns.name: TIDSPUNKT
columns.description: The timestamp indicating when this line item was created or updated.
